clustered_themes: Objective-risk-action framing improves executive usability for foreign clients.
Legal route, evidence readiness, and settlement certainty should be treated as linked mission variables.
Unclear ownership remains a top execution risk in cross-border cases.
City-level variance should be built into risk triggers and fallback actions.
